b.label: I_epsilon
b.standard_term: epsilon-parametrized period value as a linear combination of K and Pi, Cauchy-principal-value regularized for epsilon = -1

evidence.label: Complete-interval K/Pi reduction of the anti-period
DBP complete-integral values I_epsilon
evidence.summary: I_\epsilon = -t^7 \left[ A_\epsilon\Pi(n_\epsilon;m_\epsilon) -B_\epsilon K(m_\epsilon) \right], \tag{1.6} with I_- interpreted as a Cauchy principal value on the real path.

evidence.label: Path integral of omega_epsilon equals I_epsilon
evidence.summary: If \gamma_\epsilon is the upper real path x:0\to m_\epsilon, then \int_{\gamma_\epsilon}\omega_\epsilon=I_\epsilon. \tag{1.11}
